first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the listed concerns are identical. The minor differences in the justification and strengths sections are rephrasings of the same underlying information and fall within the expected range of run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the change in name influenced the core evaluation of the candidate's skills.
